title: Pixelshade
description:
🛠️ Made for Minecraft PvP (1.20+)

Short swords & axes (16x, purple-black)

Custom bow, totem, pearl

Unique golden apples

Clear cobweb texture

🚧 Upcoming updates may include more item textures and UI tweaks.
body:
🛠️ Designed specifically for Minecraft PvP players (1.20+).

 

🎨 Features:

- Custom short swords and axes (16x resolution, purple-black theme)

- Redesigned bow, totem of undying, ender pearl

- Unique textures for golden apple and enchanted golden apple

- Simplified cobweb for better visibility

 

📦 Resolution: 16x

🎮 Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+

 

🚧 Upcoming updates may include more item textures and UI tweaks.

 

👑 Created by: OnDyeMe  

🤝 Co-Creator / Contributor: LatteBey

The Pixelshade Team
